title: Sundown Cedar Porch
prompt: Create an original Japanese acoustic folk track at 84 BPM in A minor. Groove: calm fingerpicked groove with soft brushed percussion, shaker, and gentle foot taps; low end: a warm upright-style bass that moves simply under open chords. Feature steel-string guitar, nylon guitar, piano, subtle koto-like plucks used sparingly, and soft strings, using sparse fills, human timing, and newly composed motifs. Vocal: clear, intimate, and modest, with restrained harmony lines; provide no lyrics, only performance direction and melodic shape. Structure: short motif intro, light-percussion verse, passing-bass pre-chorus, emotional harmony chorus, clapless low-tension breakdown, opening-motif fade. Mix with dry vocals, warm lows, controlled highs, natural room tone, and a polished but not glossy master, keeping regional color in instrumentation and rhythm rather than melody quotation.
exclude: specific artist references, copyrighted melodies, direct folk tune copying, anthem quotes, hymn copying, EDM drop, trap hi-hats, fake crowd chants, muddy guitars
